item.summary: Due to safety concerns regarding the detachment of the tip of the intrauterine tube (IU tube) that may remain within a patient. Product details: Brand Name: Brachytherapy Applicator Product Name: Advanced Gynecological Applicator Product Description: The intended use of the Advanced Gynecological Applicator is intracavitary brachytherapy for cancer treatment of the cervix and endometrium.
